name: Rafta Rafta
overview: Rafta Rafta is a beautiful narrative of a modern-day couple who start their new innings together, every day they wake up to a romantic breeze, but then reality hits them and things take a U-turn before they realize.

trailers.title: Rafta Rafta Trailer | Bhuvan Bam | Srishti Ganguli | #WatchFree 25th Jan 2023 | Amazon miniTV
